Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{ const j=JSON.parse\(d\); const p=j.Data.driver[0].participants; console.log\(JSON.stringify\(p,null,2\)\); }\)")
